burst.msg_body: Multiple burst reads of length 64 and bit width 8 in loop 'LOAD_Q' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem0'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst reads of length 1024 and bit width 8 in loop 'LOAD_TILE' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem1'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst reads of length 1024 and bit width 8 in loop 'LOAD_TILE' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem2'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.

Multiple burst writes of length 64 and bit width 32 in loop 'WRITE_O' has been inferred on bundle 'gmem3'. These burst requests might be further partitioned into multiple requests during RTL generation, based on max_read_burst_length or max_write_burst_length settings.
